text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ah, what a beautiful morning! The temperature
and humidity are just right!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Best of all, I woke up on my own ten minutes
before the alarm!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Based on how fatigued I was, I didn't think I
would be able to wake before six o'clock... But
somehow, I got up ten minutes early instead!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That must mean I'm becoming more resilient than
I anticipated! What a happy miscalculation!

Biwa Hayahide heads toward the academy with a
bright smile on her face.
